expectations.text: [checkpoint_enforcement][blocking] Case focus is explicitly covered: blind shipment checkpoint covers prompt lifecycle, template flow, builder loading, and close or save decision safety
expectations.evidence: result.md states the case requires explicit Phase 5b shipment checkpoint enforcement covering prompt lifecycle/template flow/builder loading/close-save safety, but also states there is “no Phase 5b run output (no `checkpoint_audit`, no `checkpoint_delta`, no Phase 5b draft) and therefore no way to demonstrate that the orchestrator executed Phase 5b per the contract and enforced the checkpoint gates.” Execution_notes.md likewise notes “no Phase 5b checkpoint artifacts to show enforcement.”

expectations.text: [checkpoint_enforcement][blocking] Output aligns with primary phase phase5b
expectations.evidence: Both execution_notes.md and result.md report Phase 5b contract-required artifacts are missing: “Missing: `context/checkpoint_audit_BCIN-7289.md`, `context/checkpoint_delta_BCIN-7289.md`, `drafts/qa_plan_phase5b_r<round>.md`” and “Because there is no Phase 5b output (audit/delta/draft), the benchmark expectation ‘Output aligns with primary phase phase5b’ is not met.”
